text: eykha ׀ yasheva vadad ha'ir rabati 'am hayeta kealemana rabati vagovyim sarati bamedinovt hayeta lamas s
bakhov tiveke balayela vedime'atah 'al lecheyah eyn-lah menachem mikal-ohaveyha kal-re'eyha bagedu vah hayu lah leoyevim s
galeta yehuda me'oni umerov 'avoda hi yasheva vagovyim lo matsea manovcha kal-rodefeyha hisiguha beyn hametsarim s
darekhey tsiyovn avelovt mibeli baey mov'ed kal-she'areyha shovmemin kohaneyha neenachim betuloteyha nugovt vehi mar-lah s
hayu tsareyha lerosh oyeveyha shalu ki-yehva hovgah 'al rov-pesha'eyha 'ovlaleyha halekhu shevi lifeney-tsar s
vayetse min-vat kh mibat-tsiyovn q kal-hadarah hayu sareyha keayalim lo-matseu mire'e vayelekhu velo-khocha lifeney rovdef s
zakhera yerushalaim yemey 'aneyah umerudeyha kol machamudeyha asher hayu mimey qedem binefol 'amah beyad-tsar veeyn 'ovzer lah rauha tsarim sachaqu 'al mishebateha s
chete chatea yerushalaim 'al-ken lenida hayata kal-mekhabedeyha hiziluha ki-rau 'erevatah gam-hi neenecha vatashav achovr s
tumeatah beshuleyha lo zakhera acharitah vatered pelaim eyn menachem lah ree yehva et-'aneyi ki higedil ovyev s
yadov paras tsar 'al kal-machamadeyha ki-raata govyim bau miqedashah asher tsivita lo-yavou vaqahal lakh s
kal-'amah neenachim mevaqeshim lechem natenu machamovdeyhem kh machamadeyhem q beokhel lehashiv nafesh ree yehva vehabita ki hayiti zovlela s
lov aleykhem kal-'overey derekh habitu ureu im-yesh makheovv kemakheovi asher 'ovlal li asher hovga yehva beyovm charovn apov s
mimarovm shalach-esh be'atsemotay vayiredena paras reshet leragelay heshivani achovr netanani shomema kal-hayovm dava s
niseqad 'ol pesha'ay beyadov yisetaregu 'alu 'al-tsavari hikheshil kochi netanani adonay bidey lo-ukhal qum s
sila khal-abiray ׀ adonay beqirebi qara 'alay mov'ed lishebor bachuray gat darakh adonay livetulat bat-yehuda s
'al-ele ׀ ani vovkhiya 'eyni ׀ 'eyni yoreda mayim ki-rachaq mimeni menachem meshiv nafeshi hayu vanay shovmemim ki gavar ovyev s
peresa tsiyovn beyadeyha eyn menachem lah tsiva yehva leya'aqov sevivayv tsarayv hayeta yerushalaim lenida beyneyhem s
tsadiq hu yehva ki fihu mariti shime'u-na khal 'amim kh ha'amim q ureu makheovi betulotay uvachuray halekhu vashevi s
qarati lameahavay hema rimuni kohanay uzeqenay ba'ir gava'u ki-viqeshu okhel lamov veyashivu et-nafesham s
ree yehva ki-tsar-li me'ay chomaremaru nehepakh libi beqirebi ki marov mariti michuts shikelah-cherev babayit kamavet s
shame'u ki neenacha ani eyn menachem li kal-oyevay shame'u ra'ati sasu ki ata 'asita heveta yovm-qarata veyiheyu khamovni s
tavo khal-ra'atam lefaneykha ve'ovlel lamov kaasher 'ovlaleta li 'al kal-pesha'ay ki-rabovt anechotay velibi davay f
eykha ya'iv beapov ׀ adonay et-bat-tsiyovn hishelikh mishamayim erets tifeeret yiserael velo-zakhar hadom-ragelayv beyovm apov s
bila' adonay lo kh velo q chamal et kal-neovt ya'aqov haras be'everatov mivetserey vat-yehuda higi'a laarets chilel mamelakha vesareyha s
gada' bachori-af kol qeren yiserael heshiv achovr yeminov mipeney ovyev vayive'ar beya'aqov keesh lehava akhela saviv s
darakh qashetov keovyev nitsav yeminov ketsar vayaharog kol machamadey-'ayin beohel bat-tsiyovn shafakh kaesh chamatov s
haya adonay ׀ keovyev bila' yiserael bila' kal-aremenovteyha shichet mivetsarayv vayerev bevat-yehuda taaniya vaaniya s
vayachemos kagan sukov shichet mov'adov shikach yehva ׀ betsiyovn mov'ed veshabat vayineats beza'am-apov melekh vekhohen s
zanach adonay ׀ mizebechov nier miqedashov hisegir beyad-ovyev chovmot aremenovteyha qovl natenu beveyt-yehva keyovm mov'ed s
chashav yehva ׀ lehashechit chovmat bat-tsiyovn nata qav lo-heshiv yadov mibale'a vayaavel-chel vechovma yachedav umelalu s
tave'u vaarets she'areyha ibad veshibar bericheyha malekah vesareyha vagovyim eyn tovra gam-nevieyha lo-matseu chazovn meyehva s
yeshevu laarets yidemu ziqeney vat-tsiyovn he'elu 'afar 'al-rosham chageru saqim hovridu laarets roshan betulot yerushalaim s
kalu vadema'ovt 'eynay chomaremeru me'ay nishepakh laarets kevedi 'al-shever bat-'ami be'atef 'ovlel veyovneq birechovovt qireya s
leimotam yomeru aye dagan vayayin behite'atefam kechalal birechovovt 'ir behishetapekh nafesham el-cheyq imotam s
mah-a'idekh ma adameh-lakh habat yerushalaim ma asheveh-lakh vaanachamekh betulat bat-tsiyovn ki-gadovl kayam shiverekh mi yirepa-lakh s
neviayikh chazu lakh shave vetafel velo-gilu 'al-'aonekh lehashiv shevitekh kh shevutekh q vayechezu lakh maseovt shave umaduchim s
safequ 'alayikh kapayim kal-'overey derekh sharequ vayani'u rosham 'al-bat yerushalaim hazot ha'ir sheyomeru kelilat yofi masovs lekhal-haarets s
patsu 'alayikh pihem kal-ovyevayikh sharequ vayacharequ-shen ameru bila'enu akh ze hayovm sheqivinuhu matsanu rainu s
'asa yehva asher zamam bitsa' emeratov asher tsiva mimey-qedem haras velo chamal vayesamach 'alayikh ovyev herim qeren tsarayikh s
tsa'aq libam el-adonay chovmat bat-tsiyovn hovridi khanachal dime'a yovmam valayela al-titeni fugat lakh al-tidom bat-'eynekh s
qumi ׀ roni valayil kh valayela q lerosh ashemurovt shifekhi khamayim libekh nokhach peney adonay sei elayv kapayikh 'al-nefesh 'ovlalayikh ha'atufim bera'av berosh kal-chutsovt s
ree yehva vehabita lemi 'ovlaleta ko im-tokhalena nashim pireyam 'olaley tipuchim im-yehareg bemiqedash adonay kohen venavi s
shakhevu laarets chutsovt na'ar vezaqen betulotay uvachuray nafelu vecharev harageta beyovm apekha tavacheta lo chamaleta s
tiqera kheyovm mov'ed meguray misaviv velo haya beyovm af-yehva palit vesarid asher-tipacheti veribiti oyevi khilam f
ani hagever raa 'oni beshevet 'everatov
ovti nahag vayolakh choshekh velo-ovr
akh bi yashuv yahafokh yadov kal-hayovm s
bila vesari ve'ovri shibar 'atsemovtay
bana 'alay vayaqaf rosh utelaa
bemachashakim hovshivani kemetey 'ovlam s
gadar ba'adi velo etse hikhebid nechasheti
gam ki eze'aq vaashave'a satam tefilati
gadar derakhay begazit netivotay 'iva s
dov orev hu li areye kh ari q bemisetarim
derakhay sovrer vayefashecheni samani shomem
darakh qashetov vayatsiveni kamatara lachets s
hevi bekhileyovtay beney ashepatov
hayiti sechoq lekhal-'ami neginatam kal-hayovm
hisebi'ani vamerovrim hirevani la'ana s
vayageres bechatsats shinay hikhepishani baefer
vatizenach mishalovm nafeshi nashiti tovva
vaomar avad nitsechi vetovchaleti meyehva s
zekhar-'aneyi umerudi la'ana varosh
zakhovr tizekovr vetashicha kh vetashovcha q 'alay nafeshi
zot ashiv el-libi 'al-ken ovchil s
chasedey yehva ki lo-tamenu ki lo-khalu rachamayv
chadashim labeqarim raba emunatekha
cheleqi yehva amera nafeshi 'al-ken ovchil lov s
tovv yehva leqovav lenefesh tidereshenu
tovv veyachil vedumam liteshu'at yehva
tovv lagever ki-yisa 'ol bine'urayv s
yeshev badad veyidom ki natal 'alayv
yiten be'afar pihu ulay yesh tiqeva
yiten lemakehu lechi yiseba' becherepa s
ki lo yizenach le'ovlam adonay
ki im-hovga vericham kerov chasedov kh chasadayv q
ki lo 'ina milibov vayage beney-ish s
ledake tachat ragelayv kol asirey arets
lehatovt mishepat-gaver neged peney 'eleyovn
le'avet adam berivov adonay lo raa s
mi ze amar vatehi adonay lo tsiva
mipi 'eleyovn lo tetse hara'ovt vehatovv
mah-yiteovnen adam chay gever 'al cheteov kh chataayv q s
nachepesa derakheynu venacheqora venashuva 'ad-yehva
nisa levavenu el-kapayim el-el bashamayim
nachenu fasha'enu umarinu ata lo salacheta s
sakota vaaf vatiredefenu harageta lo chamaleta
sakovta ve'anan lakh me'avovr tefila
sechi umaovs tesimenu beqerev ha'amim s
patsu 'aleynu pihem kal-oyeveynu
pachad vafachat haya lanu hashet vehashaver
palegey-mayim terad 'eyni 'al-shever bat-'ami s
'eyni nigera velo tideme meeyn hafugovt
'ad-yasheqif veyere yehva mishamayim
'eyni 'ovlela lenafeshi mikol benovt 'iri s
tsovd tsaduni katsipovr oyevay chinam
tsametu vabovr chayay vayadu-even bi
tsafu-mayim 'al-roshi amareti nigezareti s
qarati shimekha yehva mibovr tachetiyovt
qovli shama'eta al-ta'elem azenekha leravechati leshave'ati
qaraveta beyovm eqeraeka amareta al-tira s
raveta adonay rivey nafeshi gaaleta chayay
raita yehva 'avatati shafeta mishepati
raita kal-niqematam kal-macheshevotam li s
shama'eta cherepatam yehva kal-macheshevotam 'alay
sifetey qamay vehegeyovnam 'alay kal-hayovm
shivetam veqimatam habita ani maneginatam s
tashiv lahem gemul yehva kema'ase yedeyhem
titen lahem meginat-lev taalatekha lahem
tiredof beaf vetashemidem mitachat shemey yehva f
eykha yu'am zahav yishene haketem hatovv tishetapekhena aveney-qodesh berosh kal-chutsovt s
beney tsiyovn hayeqarim hamesulaim bapaz eykha necheshevu leniveley-cheres ma'ase yedey yovtser s
gam tanin kh tanim q chaletsu shad heyniqu gureyhen bat-'ami leakhezar ki kh 'enim kh kaye'enim q bamidebar s
davaq leshovn yovneq el-chikov batsama 'ovlalim shaalu lechem pores eyn lahem s
haokhelim lema'adanim nashamu bachutsovt haemunim 'aley tovla' chibequ ashepatovt s
vayigedal 'aon bat-'ami mechatat sedom hahafukha khemov-raga' velo-chalu vah yadayim s
zaku nezireyha misheleg tsachu mechalav ademu 'etsem mipeninim sapir gizeratam s
chashakh mishechovr taoram lo nikeru bachutsovt tsafad 'ovram 'al-'atsemam yavesh haya kha'ets s
tovvim hayu chaleley-cherev mechaleley ra'av shehem yazuvu meduqarim mitenuvot saday s
yedey nashim rachamaniyovt bishelu yaledeyhen hayu levarovt lamov beshever bat-'ami s
kila yehva et-chamatov shafakh charovn apov vayatset-esh betsiyovn vatokhal yesovdoteyha s
lo heeminu malekhey-erets vekhol kh kol q yoshevey tevel ki yavo tsar veovyev besha'arey yerushalaim s
mechatot nevieyha 'aonovt kohaneyha hashofekhim beqirebah dam tsadiqim s
na'u 'iverim bachutsovt negoalu badam belo yukhelu yige'u bilevusheyhem s
suru tame qareu lamov suru suru al-tiga'u ki natsu gam-na'u ameru bagovyim lo yovsifu lagur s
peney yehva chileqam lo yovsif lehabitam peney khohanim lo nasau zeqenim kh uzeqenim q lo chananu s
'ovdeyna kh 'ovdeynu q tikheleyna 'eyneynu el-'ezeratenu havel betsipiyatenu tsipinu el-govy lo yovshi'a s
tsadu tse'adeynu milekhet birechovoteynu qarav qitseynu maleu yameynu ki-va qitseynu s
qalim hayu rodefeynu minisherey shamayim 'al-heharim delaqunu bamidebar arevu lanu s
rucha apeynu meshicha yehva nilekad bishechitovtam asher amarenu betsilov nicheye vagovyim s
sisi vesimechi bat-edovm yovshaveti kh yovshevet q beerets 'uts gam-'alayikh ta'avar-kovs tishekeri vetite'ari s
tam-'aonekh bat-tsiyovn lo yovsif lehagelovtekh paqad 'aonekh bat-edovm gila 'al-chatotayikh f
zekhor yehva meh-haya lanu habeyt kh habita q uree et-cherepatenu
nachalatenu nehefekha lezarim bateynu lenakherim
yetovmim hayinu eyn kh veeyn q av imoteynu kealemanovt
meymeynu bekhesef shatinu 'etseynu bimechir yavou
'al tsavarenu niredafenu yaga'enu lo kh velo q hunach-lanu
mitserayim natanu yad ashur lisebo'a lachem
avoteynu chateu eynam kh veeynam q anachenu kh vaanachenu q 'aonoteyhem savalenu
'avadim mashelu vanu poreq eyn miyadam
benafeshenu navi lachemenu mipeney cherev hamidebar
'ovrenu ketanur nikhemaru mipeney zale'afovt ra'av
nashim betsiyovn 'inu betulot be'arey yehuda
sarim beyadam nitelu peney zeqenim lo nehedaru
bachurim techovn nasau une'arim ba'ets kashalu
zeqenim misha'ar shavatu bachurim mineginatam
shavat mesovs libenu nehepakh leevel mecholenu
nafela 'ateret roshenu ovy-na lanu ki chatanu
'al-ze haya dave libenu 'al-ele chashekhu 'eyneynu
'al har-tsiyovn sheshamem shu'alim hilekhu-vov f
ata yehva le'ovlam teshev kiseakha ledor vadovr
lama lanetsach tishekachenu ta'azevenu leorekh yamim
hashivenu yehva ׀ eleykha venashuv kh venashuva q chadesh yameynu keqedem
ki im-maos measetanu qatsafeta 'aleynu 'ad-meod
